title: rubus capricollensis
intro: Rubus capricollensis, also known as the Alpine Raspberry or Alpine Raspberry Bush, is a type of flowering plant in the rose family that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Rubus capricollensis include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions and promote overall well-being.
